language_constraints: 'By construction' for PVR; never as achievement in results tables
No 'suitable for edge MCUs' without hardware numbers
Single-seed numbers always labeled; means quoted +- std
eta* evidence quoted as single-checkpoint until multi-seed re-run

claims.claim: HC enforces sign-consistency w.r.t. measured current (structural)
claims.evidence: PVR==0 across all v5c seeds, policies, eta values, scenarios

claims.claim: PVR 0.00% stated 'by construction', not as result

claims.evidence: anchor_last/pooled beat vanilla AND null both scenarios all 5 seeds (A 9.99+-1.09 vs 11.35/13.03; B 4.74+-0.31 vs 6.20/7.53); original HC-LSTM loses in-distribution (10.63+-0.60 vs 7.53)
anchor_last: everywhere every seed; original HC OOD only (1.98pp, up from 0.53 on v4 labels)
clamp collapse on v5c: 25.0/30.1% vs HC <=10.9/10.6
oracle-anchor null 0.03% vs learned 15-17%; interventional: carried anchor 16.75->11.11 zero retraining; calibrated recursive 3.59%
protocol-dependent; frontier quantified: calibrated-carried 4.43% vs windowed 11.05%; both protocols must be reported
v5c corrects ohmic-anchor bias + decimation conflicts; v4->v5c all models improve Scen A (-0.2..-1.8pp); null MaxE 87->61; ohmic-only correction is lower bound
54.6k params / 218KB / MCU-class MMAC; no hardware validation

claims.claim: Anchor redesign (last/pooled) necessary+sufficient to beat null in-distribution
claims.evidence: original HC fails Scen B 5/5 seeds (early-stop ~20ep, 10.63+-0.60); anchor_last/pooled 4.74/4.93 vs null 7.53 every seed

claims.claim: Delta-path rate deficit is envelope mis-calibration, correctable at inference (eta*)
claims.evidence: eta 1.5->2.0: ratio 0.751->1.002, recursive RMSE 11.78->4.43, n20 3.59; equivalent 1.75*temp-aware; retraining does NOT self-calibrate (17.6/14.9%)

claims.claim: Calibrated recursive HC beats continuous EKF without tuning sensitivity
claims.evidence: best EKF 6.85% vs HC 4.43%; EKF spans 6.8-39.1% over R decades; EKF PVR 4.9-39.6% vs HC 0%

claims.claim: Part of v4 catastrophic-MaxE narrative was label artifact
claims.evidence: null Scen-A MaxE 87->61 from label correction alone; corrected gap remains (36.5-46.5 vs 60.9)
